revision.comment: Reword to "as empty" per talk page
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
__EXPECTUNUSEDCATEGORY__{{#ifeq:{{{hide}}}|true||{{Cmbox | type = content | style = text-align: center; | text = '''Administrators: Please do not delete this category as empty!'''
This category may be empty occasionally or even most of the time. {{{1|}}} }}}}{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|{{Single namespace|category}}|}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:possibly empty categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

__EXPECTUNUSEDCATEGORY__{{#ifeq:{{{hide}}}|true||{{Cmbox | type = content | style = text-align: center; | text = '''Administrators: Please do not delete this category as empty!'''
This category may be empty occasionally or even most of the time. {{{1|}}} }}}}{{#ifeq: {{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|{{Single namespace|category}}|}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:possibly empty categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Possibly empty categories]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24593703458|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
